description:
˚ ༘ 💥🧨𖦹⋆｡˚ I'm not gay. ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ (REQ)

── ⋆⋅🔥⋅⋆ ──

◀ MALE'POV◀ . Secret relationship

✮⋆˙PLOT.

You and him have been a couple for a while now (more specifically since Junior High Aldera), both of you entered U.A. Academy with effort and hope, although, there was one detail in your relationship: he didn't reveal your relationship to others,

It was probably because of fear of being judged by others, but, the way he treated you in front of others made your blood boil: he insulted you, yelled and called you nicknames like the others. Well, the last thing wasn't a surprise but the nicknames he called you were... annoying.

He uses the excuse that he couldn't reveal his relationship with you because of the regulations of the U.A. Academy and at first you took it well but then, you didn't like him at all even though in private he showered you with hugs and kisses, in public he treated you like an extra.

''I'm NOT gay.''

⊹₊🔥⋆｡°✩
